scope.name: PREO_VALID
scope.purpose: Define the canonical validity transition gate that determines whether a PREO_CANDIDATE becomes PREO_VALID or PREO_INVALID before any merge legitimacy is considered.

exact_head_sha_binding.rule: The PREO_VALID object must bind to the exact immutable head_sha present in the PREO_CANDIDATE.

required_status_checks_resolved.rule: All required_status_checks declared in branch protection must have a resolved check conclusion in the EvidenceSnapshot for the exact head_sha.

required_status_checks_match_emitted_job.rule: Each required_status_check must resolve via an explicit alias mapping to an emitted GitHub Actions job check-run name. String-matching heuristics are forbidden.

review_requirements_satisfied.rule: All required review approvals declared in branch protection must be present, non-stale, and bound to the exact head_sha.

governance_drift_absent.rule: The EvidenceSnapshot must not contain governance drift signals. Any governance drift present forces PREO_INVALID.

head_sha_mismatch.rule: If the head_sha in the candidate differs from the head_sha in the EvidenceSnapshot, the result is PREO_INVALID.

unresolved_required_checks.rule: If any required_status_check has no resolved, passing check conclusion for the exact head_sha, the result is PREO_INVALID.

governance_drift.rule: If any governance drift is detected in the EvidenceSnapshot, the result is PREO_INVALID.

stale_review_evidence.rule: If any required review was submitted against a commit SHA other than the current head_sha, the result is PREO_INVALID.

deterministic_artifact.rule: Identical EvidenceSnapshot inputs must produce identical PREO_VALID or PREO_INVALID outputs. The transition result must be reproducible from the EvidenceSnapshot alone.

evidence_normalization.provider_variance_isolation: Provider-specific API variance must be isolated in adapter layers. Validator logic must consume only canonical EvidenceSnapshot.

required_checks_alias_model.purpose: Map each required_status_check to its allowed emitted GitHub Actions job check-run names.
alias_resolution_rules: No alias mapping -> no match -> PREO_INVALID
